funded.title: Funded Accounts
funded.subtitle: Your active funded trading accounts
funded.emptyBody: Complete the 2-phase evaluation challenge to receive a funded account. Your live trading account with real capital will appear here once you pass.

steps.title: Start a Challenge
steps.desc: Choose Plan A account size ($6K–$200K) and pay the one-time evaluation fee.

steps.title: Pass Phase 1 & 2
steps.desc: Hit the profit targets with consistent, disciplined trading. No time limit.

steps.title: KYC Verification
steps.desc: Submit your identity documents. Takes less than 24 hours.

steps.title: Receive Funded Account
steps.desc: Trade with firm capital up to $200K; performance reward up to 95% per Plan A.

steps.title: Request Payouts
steps.desc: First withdrawal after 10 funded trading days; then per /rules §11.

transactions.title: Order history

transactions.explainer: Paid rows unlock the dashboard. MT logins appear under Accounts when operations publish credentials. Withdrawal payouts will list here when funded payouts are enabled.
transactions.searchPh: Search by order ID or plan…
transactions.emptyOrders: No challenge orders yet. Complete checkout to see your purchase here.
transactions.loadError: Could not load orders. Refresh or sign in again.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions about AXON Funded.

items.q: What is a prop trading challenge?
items.a: A prop trading challenge is an evaluation where you meet profit targets while following risk rules. Passing gives you a funded account.
Phase 1: 8% target. Phase 2: 5% target. 5% daily drawdown vs day-start balance and 12% static max drawdown. See /rules.
First payout after 10 funded trading days, then on-demand when profit ≥ 1% of initial balance. Submit via Client Dashboard; no open positions; full profit only. See /rules §11.

items.q: Is there a time limit for the challenge?
items.a: No time limit on evaluation, but at least 5 distinct trading days per phase. 30-day inactivity may forfeit the account. See /rules §1.
Yes — after passing evaluations you must provide EA source code to Axon. Latency arbitrage and harmful algos are prohibited. See /rules §14 and §17.

items.q: What happens if I breach a rule?
items.a: Accounts typically close immediately when daily (5%) or max (12%) drawdown is touched. You may purchase a new challenge. See /rules §5.

items.q: What counts as a trading day?
items.a: A day counts when a position is opened. Holding Mon–Fri can still be one day. You may use minimum lot size after hitting profit target. See /rules §1 and §3.
Yes — no restriction on high-impact news trading; you assume volatility, spread, and slippage risk. See /rules §8.

items.q: What is the profit split on funded accounts?
items.a: Your binding split is in your agreement and checkout terms; marketing may reference tiers like 80%+. Use /rules and your contract as final reference.

items.q: How do I request a payout?
items.a: Use the Client Dashboard under §11 conditions: no open positions, no new trades until processing completes, full-profit withdrawals only.
Rules §12: a 20% retake discount may apply if you repurchase within 24 hours of deactivation — contact Live Support for the code.

tradingRules.title: Trading rules
tradingRules.subtitle: Same official text as the public rules page. Expand a section to read it in full.
tradingRules.reminderBody: Breach of daily (5%) or maximum (12%) drawdown, prohibited technical abuse, or changing MT passwords may result in account closure. When in doubt, open a support ticket before trading.

payouts.subtitle: Withdraw your trading profits
payouts.preFundedNote: Funded profit withdrawals appear here after you pass evaluation, complete KYC, and meet Trading Rules §11. Until then, balances may show $0 — this is normal.

wallet.title: Axon Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Balances, payouts, and order history in one place.
wallet.body: Use order history for invoices and deposits; use payouts when you are eligible for withdrawals per Trading Rules.

kyc.title: KYC Verification
kyc.subtitle: Identity checks before funded payouts.
kyc.body: Upload documents from your profile when requested. Our team reviews submissions in line with §9 of the Trading Rules.
checklist: Government-issued photo ID (passport or national ID)
Proof of address (utility bill or bank statement, usually ≤ 90 days)
A quiet place for selfie / liveness when the verification flow opens
kyc.rulesRef: Read Trading Rules §9 before sending sensitive documents.
